name: monday
description: Manage boards, items, and column values in monday.com work management

envVars.name: MONDAY_CLIENT_ID
envVars.description: monday.com OAuth Client ID (from your app in the Developer Center)

tools.name: List Boards
tools.description: List boards in the monday.com account

endpoint.query: query($limit: Int, $page: Int) { boards(limit: $limit, page: $page) { id name description state board_kind items_count workspace { id name } } }

historicalSummary.omitted: board descriptions, groups, and provider-specific payload fields

tools.name: List Items
tools.description: List items on a monday.com board with their column values

endpoint.query: query($boardId: [ID!], $limit: Int, $cursor: String) { boards(ids: $boardId) { items_page(limit: $limit, cursor: $cursor) { cursor items { id name state created_at updated_at group { id title } column_values { id text type } } } } }

boardId.description: Board ID to list items from

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous items_page response

tools.name: Get Item
tools.description: Get a monday.com item by ID with its column values and updates

endpoint.query: query($itemId: [ID!]) { items(ids: $itemId) { id name state created_at updated_at board { id name } group { id title } column_values { id text type value } updates { id body created_at } } }

tools.name: Create Item
tools.description: Create a new item on a monday.com board

endpoint.query: mutation($boardId: ID!, $groupId: String, $itemName: String!, $columnValues: JSON) { create_item(board_id: $boardId, group_id: $groupId, item_name: $itemName, column_values: $columnValues) { id name board { id } } }

boardId.description: Board ID to create the item on

groupId.description: Group ID within the board (defaults to the first group)

tools.name: Update Column Values
tools.description: Update one or more column values on an existing monday.com item

endpoint.query: mutation($boardId: ID!, $itemId: ID!, $columnValues: JSON!) { change_multiple_column_values(board_id: $boardId, item_id: $itemId, column_values: $columnValues) { id name column_values { id text } } }

boardId.description: Board ID the item belongs to

columnValues.description: JSON-encoded column values to set, e.g. "{\"status\": {\"label\": \"Working on it\"}}"

prompts.title: Board overview
prompts.prompt: List my monday.com boards and summarize the items on the most active one.

prompts.title: Add an item
prompts.prompt: Create a new item on a monday.com board with a name and status.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: monday.com OAuth Setup

steps.title: Create a monday.com app
steps.description: Sign in to monday.com (a free trial account works) and open the Developer Center via your avatar → Developers, or https://developer.monday.com/apps/docs/the-developer-center. Click Create App.

steps.title: Configure OAuth scopes and redirect URI
steps.description: In the app's OAuth section, enable the boards:read and boards:write scopes and add your redirect URI ending in /api/auth/monday/callback.

steps.title: Copy credentials
steps.description: Copy the Client ID and Client Secret from the app's Basic Information page into MONDAY_CLIENT_ID and MONDAY_CLIENT_SECRET.

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Connect your monday.com account and run the List Boards tool.

notes: monday.com OAuth access tokens do not expire and there are no refresh tokens; tokens stay valid until the user uninstalls the app
The API is GraphQL-only at https://api.monday.com/v2; OAuth tokens are sent as Authorization: Bearer <token>
Column values in mutations are passed as a JSON-encoded string
